It's now common knowledge that Olympic gold medals aren't pure gold, but Paris 2024 is upping the game: All 5,084 medals feature a piece of the Eiffel Tower at their center. This creative touch not only emphasizes a commitment to sustainability but also celebrates the city's iconic symbol. From recycled car parts in Rio to e-waste in Tokyo, the Games is blending sports with eco-friendly innovation.

title: Olympic Medals: From Gold to 'Green' - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: It's now common knowledge that Olympic gold medals aren't pure gold, but Paris 2024 is upping the game: All 5,084 medals feature a piece of the Eiffel Tower at their center. This creative touch not only emphasizes a commitment to sustainability but also celebrates the city's iconic symbol.
